вң… Web interface for remote monitoring
вң… RESTful API for programmatic access

вң… Data export to files, databases, CSV, STDOUT

вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ 32.4K рқҳҖрқҳҒрқ—®рқ—ҝрқҳҖ
рҹҚҙ 1.7K рқ—ірқ—јрқ—ҝрқ—ёрқҳҖ
рҹ”Қ 87 рқ—јрқ—Ҫрқ—Ірқ—» рқ—¶рқҳҖрқҳҖрқҳӮрқ—ІрқҳҖ

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

Glances is an open-source, cross-platform system monitoring tool written in Python. It provides real-time insights into CPU, memory, disk, network, processes, and container usage, with a user-friendly dashboard. It supports remote monitoring via a web interface, CLI, and RESTful API, and can export data to various formats or databases.

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

Luna is a self-hosted calendar aggregator and frontend application that consolidates calendars from various protocols like CalDav, iCal, and Google Calendar into a single, customizable web interface. It offers extensive theming options and user management, aiming to provide a unified and personalized calendar experience.

AI File Sorter is a cross-platform desktop application that leverages AI to intelligently organize and rename files like images, documents, and media. It offers a privacy-first approach by supporting local LLMs and providing preview-based workflows for user-controlled file management.

Phantom is an AI co-worker designed to be persistent and self-evolving, acting as an independent agent with its own dedicated computing environment. It goes beyond typical chatbots by installing software, managing data, and building infrastructure autonomously, improving its capabilities over time.

Claw Code is a Rust implementation of the `claw` CLI agent harness, designed to provide a command-line interface for interacting with AI agents. It focuses on building and running these agents, with features for managing sessions, authentication, and checking system parity.
